notes: FAIR-MAST Level-2 (classic MAST) current_channel labels → FreeGSNKE classic circuit names. Series-wound U/L FEED pairs (P2–P5, P3) report the same circuit amp → combine=mean (sum would double). P6 is anti-series vertical control → antisym_mean=0.5*(P6L-P6U); FreeGSNKE lower P6 filament polarity=-1.

P2_inner.notes: Series pair; U/L FEED ≈ same I → mean (not sum).

P2_outer.notes: Series pair; U/L FEED ≈ same I → mean (not sum).

P3.notes: Series pair when energized; U/L FEED ≈ same I → mean (not sum).

P4.notes: Series pair; U/L FEED ≈ same I → mean (not sum).

P5.notes: Series pair; U/L FEED ≈ same I → mean (not sum).

P6.notes: Anti-series vertical-control pair. Do NOT sum (cancels). I=0.5*(P6L-P6U); machine lower filament polarity=-1.
